title: CAISO AS Prices JSON API
description:
Ancillary Services Prices as reported by CAISO. Not all regions report prices for each hour, day, or even year. 

AS_CAISO, AS_CAISO_EXP, AS_NP26, AS_NP26_EXP, AS_SP26, and AS_SP26_EXP have consistent data throughout the series. AS_SP15 and AS_NP15 are nested within other zones and record prices very infrequently.

**AS Mapping**

The *_EXP show only the intertie resources.
 
-    AS_SP26_P: Resources in AS_SP26
-    AS_NP26_P: Resources in AS_NP26
-    AS_SP15_P: Resources in AS_SP15
-    AS_NP15_P: Resources in AS_NP15
-    AS_SP26_EXP_P: Resources in AS_SP26_EXP which are not in AS_SP26
-    AS_NP26_EXP_P: Resources in AS_NP26_EXP which are not in AS_NP26
-    AS_SP15_EXP_P: Resources in AS_SP15_EXP which are not in AS_SP15
-    AS_NP15_EXP_P: Resources in AS_NP15_EXP which are not in AS_NP15
-    AS_CAISO_NP26_P: Resources in AS_CAISO which are not in AS_SP26
-    AS_CAISO_SP26_P: Resources in AS_CAISO which are not in AS_NP26
-    AS_CAISO_NP15_P: Resources in AS_CAISO which are not in AS_SP15
-    AS_CAISO_SP15_P: Resources in AS_CAISO which are not in AS_NP15
